---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for AgentOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem you are trying to solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that motivates this feature.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
